easy.a: A bunt intended to advance a baserunner at the cost of the batter being thrown out

easy.a: Hits divided by at-bats (how often a batter gets a hit)

medium.q: Joe DiMaggio's 56-game hitting streak was set in what year?
What is a 'perfect game' in baseball?
medium.a: A complete game where the pitcher retires all 27 batters (no hits, walks, or errors)

medium.q: Who threw the only perfect game in World Series history (1956)?
What MLB pitcher holds the record for most career strikeouts with 5,714?
What is the 'infield fly rule'?
medium.a: An automatic out called on a fair pop fly that an infielder can catch with runners on first and second (or bases loaded) and fewer than two outs

medium.q: What team ended an 86-year championship drought when they won the 2004 World Series?

medium.a: A batter who can hit from both the left and right sides of the plate

medium.a: The rectangular area on either side of home plate where the batter stands during an at-bat

medium.q: What legendary catcher for the Yankees was known for malapropisms and quotes like 'It ain't over till it's over'?

medium.a: A misplay by a fielder that allows a batter or runner to advance when they should have been retired

medium.a: A substitute batter who replaces another player in the lineup, often for a strategic advantage

medium.q: What famous baseball poem begins 'Take me out to the ball game'?
medium.a: That is a song — 'Take Me Out to the Ball Game', written by Jack Norworth in 1908

hard.a: Boston Americans (forerunner of the Red Sox)
